creator: hsu@clinet.fi
text:
System becomes very sluggish and vmstat output shows up odd things:

 procs   memory     page                    disks         faults      cpu
 r b w   avm   fre  flt  re  pi  po  fr  sr f0 s0 s3 s7   in   sy  cs us sy id

 6 623609280  8072  565  32  41 124 278 41032  0 14592 6272 384  759 3293 494  0  0  0

systat fails with

          The alternate system clock has died!
          Reverting to ``pigs'' display.

when I try to get vmstat display.

I noticed the following messages earlier in messages, but I don't know
whether these are the reason for the failure. 

Dec 18 12:03:55 katiska /kernel: sd7(ncr1:3:0): MEDIUM ERROR info:d0de6 asc:11,0 Unrecovered read error field replaceable unit: d0 sks:80,29
